title: Turanga pruinosa
intro: Turanga pruinosa, also known as Turanga, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The health benefits of Turanga pruinosa include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, such as naringenin and hesperidin, as well as limonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Turanga pruinosa is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
